title: Create: Overloaded
description: Step into the world of Create and explore new biomes and dungeons
body:
# Create: Overloaded
Embark on an exhilarating journey through _Create: Overloaded_ that seamlessly blends adventure with technology, introducing players to new biomes and dungeons ripe for exploration. At the core of this experience is the Create Mod, offering a suite of mechanical wonders to master. Traverse lush landscapes, uncover forgotten ruins, and brave treacherous dungeons, all while harnessing the power of innovation to conquer challenges and engineer marvels beyond imagination. Each step forward promises excitement and discovery as you navigate this world of boundless possibilities.

### Building & Technology
Unleash your creativity and construct the unimaginable with a diverse array of new blocks and the three most popular technology mods: Create, AE2, and Mekanism. From towering skyscrapers to intricate machinery, blend the innovative features of these mods to engineer wonders that defy expectation. With Create's dynamic mechanical contraptions, AE2's advanced storage and automation systems, and Mekanism's cutting-edge energy production and processing capabilities, craft a world where imagination knows no bounds.


![Create Mod Contraptions](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2b6d8f4548fcfc24f1a5f0b94fde4640aec23919.jpeg)



### Adventure
Embark on a thrilling Minecraft adventure with our modpack, featuring a world map mod that enhances exploration like never before. Equip your backpacks and prepare to traverse through new biomes teeming with exotic flora and fauna, spanning across both familiar realms and mysterious dimensions. But beware, as you encounter challenging new mobs lurking in the shadows of these uncharted lands. From lush forests to desolate deserts, the world is yours to discover and conquer in this immersive modpack experience.

### _**FOR A BETTER EXPERIENCE, GIVE THE GAME AT LEAST 6GB OF RAM!**_
